text.title: SOC2 Control-to-Repo Artifact Map Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply soc2-control-to-repo-artifact-map. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Enumerate controls
step.description: Input: SOC2 audit scope. Action: List all in-scope controls.. Output: Control list..
step.note: Step 1. Required input: SOC2 audit scope.

step.name: Map artifacts
step.description: Input: Control list + repo + IaC. Action: Per control, locate live artifact path.. Output: Mapped controls..
step.note: Step 2. Required input: Control list + repo + IaC.

step.name: Owners + retention
step.description: Input: Mapped controls. Action: Assign owner + retention SLA per control.. Output: Enriched map..

step.name: Verify
step.description: Input: Enriched map. Action: Run quarterly verification; flag stale.. Output: Verified evidence..

step.name: Bundle for audit
step.description: Input: Verified evidence. Action: Generate audit-ready bundle.. Output: Audit bundle..
